---
name: hello-world
description: Hello World example skill for testing plugin distribution
---

# Hello World Skill

This skill proves that the plugin distribution model is working correctly.

## What This Skill Does

When invoked, this skill confirms:
- Plugin installation worked correctly
- Skills are properly bundled and discoverable
- Copilot can invoke plugin skills
- Distribution from GitHub works

## How to Use

Run this command in Copilot:

```
/hello-world
```

Or ask: "Run the hello-world skill"
